notes: Behind-the-scenes reliability release — nothing changes in how Ice works day to day. · Broad new automated test coverage. Added tests across hotkeys, menu-bar color/gradient logic, backup & restore, layout-profile guards, and settings load/persist — making future updates safer and more predictable. · Lower idle CPU and a guard so updating a layout profile can't overwrite it with an empty capture (carried over from 2.9.8). · test: expand IceTests coverage for hotkey/color/gradient logic
release: v2.9.8 — lower idle CPU + guard layout-profile Update against empty capture
fix: "Update" on a layout profile now saves the current arrangement (v2.9.7)
release: v2.9.6 — consolidate reveal toggles, move icon chooser to Appearance
fix: order settings panes to the canonical Dragon convention · release: v2.9.4 — canonical settings pane order
test(layout): add Layout pane test coverage (IceTests target + manual plan) · feat(icon): new "two ice cubes" app icon (v2.9.3)
fix: bump to 2.9.2 so update checks detect the release
